case_title: PAIGE CASAMENTO VS. CARS DAWDIAK INC.

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAR-07-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-24-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-10-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF PAIGE CASAMENTO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARS DAWDIAK INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY WALTER DAWDIAK, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT DECLINES STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER: PLAINTIFF MUST GO TO COURT TO BE HEARD. HEARING DATE: 6/5/18 AT 10AM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF PAIGE CASAMENTO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARS DAWDIAK, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY WALTER DAWDIAK, OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASAMENTO, PAIGE DBA PAIGE PRODUCTIONS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARS DAWDIAK INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
